hero.title: Book Your Appointment Online
hero.subtitle: Choose a convenient time and book in a few clicks

booking.title: Book an Appointment
booking.noSlots: No available slots for this date
booking.consent: I agree that my name, phone number, email and appointment details will be stored and used only for managing my visits and sending reminders, according to the Privacy Policy.

success.title: Appointment Booked!
success.message: Your appointment on {date} at {time} has been created.
success.telegramPrompt: Confirm your booking via Telegram to receive reminders:
success.telegramSent: We sent you a message in Telegram. Confirm your booking there or log in to confirm here:

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your phone number to continue

errors.notFound: Phone number not found. Please register.
errors.unverified: Phone not verified. Register again and we'll send a new verification link.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.generic: Sign in failed. Please try again.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Fill in your details to register
register.name: Name
register.consent: I agree that my name, phone number and email will be stored and used only for managing my appointments and sending reminders, according to the Privacy Policy.

errors.phoneExists: This phone number is already registered. Please sign in.

verify.title: Verification
verify.telegramInstructions: Click the button below to open the bot and verify your phone number.
verify.useAccountFor: Use the Telegram account with number:
verify.orScanQr: or scan the QR code on your phone
verify.expired: Link expired. Request a new one.

dashboard.title: My Appointments
dashboard.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
